title: Turn 10,994 Notes Into Memory - Paul Iusztin, Decoding AI & Louis-François Bouchard, Towards AI
summary: Paul Iusztin and Louis-François Bouchard present a technique for converting notes, documents, videos, and repositories into memory representations usable by AI agents. The approach addresses knowledge encoding and retrieval for autonomous systems.
